# 🧠 15 AI SaaS Projects — Volume 2 (Expanded Edition)

> 15 brand-new, unique AI SaaS ideas with full product specs + copy-paste Framer AI prompts.  
> Every idea targets **real pain points** trending on X/Twitter in 2026.

---

**Project #1: QueryPilot**

**Short Description:** Talk to any database in plain English — no SQL, no joins, no syntax errors. Just ask "show me top customers by revenue last quarter" and get instant results with auto-generated charts.

**Target Audience:** Business analysts, product managers, marketing teams, and startup founders who need data answers daily but refuse to learn SQL or bother their engineering team with every query.

**Key Features:**
- Natural language to SQL translation with 99% accuracy
- Auto-generated visualizations (bar, line, pie, heatmap)
- Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, BigQuery, Snowflake, MongoDB
- Query history with shareable dashboards
- Scheduled queries with Slack/email alerts
- Row-level security and team permissions
- One-click export to CSV, Google Sheets, or Notion
- AI-suggested follow-up questions based on results

**Hero Headline:** "Ask Your Database Anything. In English."

**Hero Subheadline:** "Stop writing SQL. Stop waiting for engineers. Get instant answers from any database — just by asking."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Connect your database in 30 seconds (read-only, encrypted)
2. Ask any question in plain English — "What's our MRR trend?" or "Which campaigns had the highest ROI?"
3. Get instant results with auto-charts, share with your team, or schedule recurring reports

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 50 queries/month, 1 database, basic charts
- Pro ($24/mo): Unlimited queries, 5 databases, scheduled reports, Slack alerts
- Enterprise ($79/mo): Unlimited everything, SSO, audit logs, dedicated support, custom connectors

**Ready-to-use Framer AI Prompt:**

> Create a premium, high-converting landing page in dark futuristic style for "QueryPilot" — an AI SaaS that lets anyone query any database using plain English instead of SQL. Users connect their PostgreSQL, MySQL, BigQuery, or Snowflake database, then type questions like "show me top 10 customers by lifetime value" and get instant results with auto-generated charts. Visual style: dark mode background (#0A0A0F), neon cyan (#00F0FF) and purple/magenta (#B026FF) accent colors, glassmorphism cards with frosted-glass borders, bento grid layout for features, heavy scroll-triggered animations (fade-up, parallax, staggered reveals), smooth hover effects on all interactive elements, modern sans-serif typography (Inter or Satoshi). Include these sections in order: (1) Hero section with bold headline "Ask Your Database Anything. In English." and subheadline "Stop writing SQL. Stop waiting for engineers. Get instant answers from any database — just by asking." plus a primary CTA button "Try Free — No SQL Required" with a glowing neon border, and an animated demo/video placeholder showing a plain-English query transforming into SQL results with auto-charts; (2) Problem section with 3 pain-point cards: "SQL Is a Bottleneck", "Engineers Hate Ad-Hoc Requests", "Data Should Be Accessible to All" each with relevant icons and scroll-triggered fade-in animations; (3) How It Works section in a 3-step bento grid with glassmorphism cards: "Connect Your Database → Ask in Plain English → Get Charts & Answers Instantly"; (4) Features grid with icons covering: Natural Language to SQL, Auto-Visualizations, Multi-Database Support, Scheduled Queries, Team Sharing, Row-Level Security, Export Anywhere, AI Follow-Up Suggestions; (5) Testimonials carousel with 3 realistic reviews from a "Product Manager at Series B Startup", "Marketing Director", and "Data-Driven Founder" with star ratings and company logos; (6) Pricing section with 3 tiers: Free (50 queries/mo), Pro ($24/mo), Enterprise ($79/mo) with feature comparison and a highlighted "Most Popular" badge on Pro; (7) FAQ accordion with 5 questions about database security, supported databases, query accuracy, data privacy, and team collaboration; (8) Final big CTA footer section with headline "Your Data Has Answers. Stop Gatekeeping Them." and a large centered CTA button with neon glow effect. Make it feel premium and trustworthy like Lovable, Cursor, or Arc — clean whitespace, polished micro-interactions, and a sense of cutting-edge technology. Make it bilingual ready (English primary).

**Project #2: PixelPurge**

**Short Description:** AI-powered background removal, object erasure, and batch photo editing at scale — process 1,000 images in minutes, not days. Built for e-commerce teams and content creators.

**Target Audience:** E-commerce sellers (Shopify, Amazon), social media managers, product photographers, and marketing teams who need to edit hundreds of product images weekly without hiring designers.

**Key Features:**
- One-click background removal with hair/edge precision
- AI object erasure (remove watermarks, blemishes, unwanted items)
- Batch processing: upload 1,000+ images, process all at once
- Auto-resize for every platform (Instagram, Amazon, Shopify, etc.)
- Brand-consistent templates with auto-applied styling
- AI upscaling up to 4x without quality loss
- API for integration with existing workflows
- Before/after comparison slider on every edit

**Hero Headline:** "Edit 1,000 Photos. Before Your Coffee Gets Cold."

**Hero Subheadline:** "AI-powered batch photo editing — background removal, object erasure, resizing, and enhancement — at scale."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Upload your images (drag & drop 1 or 1,000 — we handle both)
2. Choose your edits: remove backgrounds, erase objects, resize, enhance, or apply templates
3. Download all processed images in seconds, perfectly formatted for every platform

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 20 images/month, basic background removal
- Pro ($19/mo): 2,000 images/month, all AI tools, batch processing, templates
- Enterprise ($59/mo): Unlimited images, API access, white-label, priority rendering

**Ready-to-use Framer AI Prompt:**

> Create a premium, high-converting landing page in dark futuristic style for "PixelPurge" — an AI-powered batch photo editing SaaS for e-commerce and content teams. Users upload hundreds of product images and the AI removes backgrounds, erases unwanted objects, resizes for any platform, and enhances quality — all in batch, in minutes. Visual style: dark mode background (#0A0A0F), neon cyan (#00F0FF) and purple/magenta (#B026FF) accent colors, glassmorphism cards with frosted-glass borders, bento grid layout for features, heavy scroll-triggered animations (fade-up, parallax, staggered reveals), smooth hover effects on all interactive elements, modern sans-serif typography (Inter or Satoshi). Before Your Coffee Gets Cold." and subheadline "AI-powered batch photo editing — background removal, object erasure, resizing, and enhancement — at scale." with primary CTA "Start Editing Free" with neon glow, and an animated before/after demo placeholder showing a raw product photo transforming into a polished, background-removed image; (2) Problem section with 3 cards: "Manual Editing = $5 Per Image", "Freelancer Turnaround Takes Days", "Inconsistent Quality Kills Your Brand" with icons; (3) How It Works 3-step bento: "Upload Your Images → Choose AI Edits → Download Perfected Photos"; (4) Features grid: Background Removal, Object Erasure, Batch Processing, Platform-Ready Resizing, Brand Templates, 4x AI Upscaling, API Integration, Before/After Preview; (5) Testimonials carousel from "Shopify Store Owner", "Amazon FBA Seller", "Social Media Manager"; (6) Pricing: Free (20 images/mo), Pro ($19/mo — 2K images), Enterprise ($59/mo — unlimited, API); (7) FAQ about supported formats, edge quality, batch limits, API rate limits, refund policy; (8) Final CTA: "Stop Paying $5/Photo. **Project #3: ContractIQ**

**Short Description:** Upload any contract and get an instant AI-powered risk analysis, clause summary, and plain-English explanation — catch dangerous terms before you sign, not after.

**Target Audience:** Freelancers, startup founders, small business owners, and solopreneurs who sign contracts regularly but can't afford a lawyer to review every NDA, service agreement, or vendor contract.

**Key Features:**
- Upload PDF/DOCX and get instant AI analysis in under 60 seconds
- Risk score (1-100) with highlighted dangerous clauses
- Plain-English summary of every section
- Side-by-side comparison of two contract versions (redline)
- AI-suggested edits to protect your interests
- Clause library with industry-standard alternatives
- Unlimited contract storage with searchable archive
- SOC 2 compliant data handling

**Hero Headline:** "Read the Fine Print. In 60 Seconds."

**Hero Subheadline:** "AI scans your contracts, highlights risky clauses, and explains everything in plain English — so you never sign blind again."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Upload any contract (PDF, DOCX, or paste text)
2. AI analyzes every clause, assigns a risk score, and highlights concerns in red/yellow/green
3. Get a plain-English summary, suggested edits, and safer alternative clauses — all in under a minute

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 3 contracts/month, basic risk score
- Pro ($29/mo): Unlimited contracts, redline comparison, AI-suggested edits, clause library
- Enterprise ($89/mo): Team accounts, custom risk profiles, API, bulk analysis, SSO

**Ready-to-use Framer AI Prompt:**

> Create a premium, high-converting landing page in dark futuristic style for "ContractIQ" — an AI-powered contract review and risk analysis SaaS. Users upload any contract (PDF/DOCX) and get an instant risk score, clause-by-clause summary in plain English, dangerous term highlights, and AI-suggested safer alternatives. Visual style: dark mode background (#0A0A0F), neon cyan (#00F0FF) and purple/magenta (#B026FF) accent colors, glassmorphism cards with frosted-glass borders, bento grid layout for features, heavy scroll-triggered animations (fade-up, parallax, staggered reveals), smooth hover effects on all interactive elements, modern sans-serif typography (Inter or Satoshi). **Project #4: VoiceBoard**

**Short Description:** Turn voice memos and meeting rambles into structured Kanban tasks, PRDs, and project briefs — just talk, and AI organizes everything into actionable work items.

**Target Audience:** Product managers, creative directors, agency founders, and ADHD entrepreneurs who think faster than they type and lose brilliant ideas because they can't be bothered to write them down properly.

**Key Features:**
- Record or upload voice memos (up to 30 min each)
- AI auto-categorizes into tasks, ideas, blockers, and decisions
- Outputs to Kanban board, Notion, Linear, Jira, or Trello
- Smart priority assignment based on urgency cues in your speech
- Speaker identification for multi-person recordings
- Follow-up reminders for mentioned deadlines
- Searchable transcript archive with AI-powered retrieval
- Works in 12 languages with auto-translation

**Hero Headline:** "Talk It Out. Ship It Out."

**Hero Subheadline:** "Turn chaotic voice memos into perfectly structured tasks, PRDs, and project briefs — AI does the organizing."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Record a voice memo or upload any audio — ramble as much as you want
2. AI transcribes, categorizes, and structures everything into tasks, priorities, and action items
3. Push organized tasks directly to your PM tool (Notion, Linear, Jira) with one click

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 10 memos/month, basic task extraction
- Pro ($22/mo): Unlimited memos, PM tool sync, priority detection, speaker ID
- Enterprise ($65/mo): Team workspace, custom categories, API, analytics dashboard

**Ready-to-use Framer AI Prompt:**

> Create a premium, high-converting landing page in dark futuristic style for "VoiceBoard" — an AI SaaS that converts voice memos and meeting rambles into structured Kanban tasks, PRDs, and project briefs. Users record or upload audio, and AI transcribes, categorizes, assigns priority, and pushes organized tasks to Notion, Linear, or Jira. **Project #5: BugHound**

**Short Description:** AI that monitors your web app 24/7, catches bugs before users do, auto-generates reproduction steps, and opens fix-ready GitHub issues with suggested code patches.

**Target Audience:** Indie hackers, startup engineering teams, QA engineers, and solo developers who ship fast but can't afford dedicated QA teams to catch regressions and edge-case bugs.

**Key Features:**
- Install via one-line script — monitors your app in production
- AI detects visual regressions, broken flows, console errors, and slow pages
- Auto-generates step-by-step reproduction instructions
- Opens GitHub/GitLab issues with screenshots, stack traces, and suggested fixes
- Smart severity scoring (critical → cosmetic)
- Slack/Discord alerts with priority triage
- Historical bug pattern analysis (detects recurring issues)
- Performance regression detection with before/after metrics

**Hero Headline:** "Catch Bugs Before Your Users Do."

**Hero Subheadline:** "AI monitors your app 24/7, detects issues, generates repro steps, and opens fix-ready issues — your autonomous QA team."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Add one line of code to your app (takes 2 minutes)
2. AI continuously monitors for visual regressions, errors, broken flows, and performance drops
3. Get bug reports with screenshots, repro steps, and suggested code fixes — auto-filed to GitHub

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 1 app, basic error monitoring, 100 checks/day
- Pro ($32/mo): 5 apps, visual regression, auto-issues, Slack alerts, suggested fixes
- Enterprise ($99/mo): Unlimited apps, custom test flows, SLA, dedicated support, API

**Ready-to-use Framer AI Prompt:**

> Create a premium, high-converting landing page in dark futuristic style for "BugHound" — an AI-powered autonomous QA and bug detection SaaS. It monitors web apps 24/7, catches visual regressions, broken user flows, console errors, and performance issues, then auto-generates reproduction steps and opens fix-ready GitHub issues with suggested code patches. Visual style: dark mode background (#0A0A0F), neon cyan (#00F0FF) and purple/magenta (#B026FF) accent colors, glassmorphism cards with frosted-glass borders, bento grid layout for features, heavy scroll-triggered animations (fade-up, parallax, staggered reveals), smooth hover effects on all interactive elements, modern sans-serif typography (Inter or Satoshi). **Project #6: CopyForge AI**

**Short Description:** Feed it your brand voice, product details, and audience — it generates entire marketing campaigns: landing page copy, ad variations, emails, social posts, and SEO blogs in one click.

**Target Audience:** Solopreneurs, marketing teams at startups, agency copywriters, and D2C brands who spend 10+ hours per week writing marketing copy across multiple channels and platforms.

**Key Features:**
- Brand voice training: upload examples, it learns your tone permanently
- Full campaign generation: landing page + emails + ads + social in one prompt
- A/B copy variations with predicted conversion scores
- SEO blog writer with keyword optimization and internal linking
- Ad copy for Meta, Google, LinkedIn, TikTok — platform-optimized
- Email sequence builder (welcome, nurture, win-back, launch)
- Tone adjustment slider (professional ↔ casual ↔ edgy)
- Plagiarism check and brand guideline compliance

**Hero Headline:** "One Prompt. An Entire Marketing Campaign."

**Hero Subheadline:** "AI that knows your brand voice and generates landing pages, ads, emails, and social posts — all at once."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Train the AI on your brand voice (upload 3-5 examples of your best copy)
2. Describe your campaign goal: product launch, Black Friday sale, feature announcement, etc.
3. Get a complete multichannel campaign — landing page copy, email sequences, ad variations, social posts — ready to publish

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 5 generations/month, 1 brand voice profile
- Pro ($27/mo): Unlimited generations, 5 brand profiles, A/B variations, SEO blogs
- Agency ($79/mo): Unlimited profiles, client workspaces, white-label, API, team seats

**Ready-to-use Framer AI Prompt:**

> Create a premium, high-converting landing page in dark futuristic style for "CopyForge AI" — an AI-powered marketing copy generator that produces entire multichannel campaigns from a single prompt. Users train it on their brand voice, then describe a campaign, and it generates landing page copy, email sequences, ad variations (Meta, Google, TikTok), social posts, and SEO blog articles. **Project #7: RowBot**

**Short Description:** An AI assistant that lives inside your Google Sheets and Excel — automates data entry, writes formulas, creates charts, cleans data, and answers questions about your spreadsheet conversationally.

**Target Audience:** Accountants, project managers, HR teams, teachers, and anyone who lives in spreadsheets daily but wastes hours on repetitive data entry, manual formatting, and formula debugging.

**Key Features:**
- In-sheet AI chat: ask questions about your data without leaving the spreadsheet
- Auto-fills columns by understanding patterns (like GitHub Copilot for cells)
- Formula writer + debugger: describe what you need, get the formula
- Smart data cleaning: fix dates, remove duplicates, standardize formats inline
- Auto-chart generation based on natural language requests
- Scheduled automations: "every Monday, pull data from X and update column Y"
- Works as Google Sheets plugin AND Excel add-in
- Context-aware: understands your sheet structure and column relationships

**Hero Headline:** "Your Spreadsheet Just Got Superpowers."

**Hero Subheadline:** "An AI co-pilot that lives inside your sheets — writes formulas, cleans data, builds charts, and answers questions in real time."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Install the plugin (Google Sheets or Excel — takes 30 seconds)
2. Start chatting with your spreadsheet: "clean column B", "chart revenue by month", "fill missing emails"
3. Watch AI edit your sheet in real-time — review, approve, and keep working

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 50 AI actions/month, basic formula writing
- Pro ($15/mo): Unlimited actions, auto-fill, data cleaning, chart generation
- Team ($39/mo): Shared workspaces, scheduled automations, admin controls, API

**Ready-to-use Framer AI Prompt:**

> Create a premium, high-converting landing page in dark futuristic style for "RowBot" — an AI assistant that lives inside Google Sheets and Excel as a plugin. It writes formulas, auto-fills columns by pattern, cleans data, generates charts, and answers questions about your spreadsheet conversationally — all without leaving the sheet. **Project #8: FlowSnap**

**Short Description:** AI-powered user session recording that doesn't just record — it analyzes, identifies UX friction, auto-tags rage clicks, and generates specific UI improvement recommendations.

**Target Audience:** UX designers, product managers, growth teams, and SaaS founders who use Hotjar/FullStory but drown in hours of session recordings without actionable insights.

**Key Features:**
- Lightweight session recording (< 5KB script, zero performance impact)
- AI auto-tags key moments: rage clicks, dead clicks, confusion loops, drop-offs
- Heatmaps with AI-generated "why" explanations
- Auto-generated UX improvement reports with specific recommendations
- Funnel analysis with AI-identified bottlenecks
- Sentiment detection through mouse behavior patterns
- No-PII mode for GDPR/CCPA compliance by default
- Integrates with Figma, Linear, and Slack for direct hand-off

**Hero Headline:** "Stop Watching Recordings. Start Understanding Users."

**Hero Subheadline:** "AI-powered session analytics that auto-detects UX friction, explains why users struggle, and tells you exactly what to fix."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Add one script tag to your site (< 5KB, zero performance impact)
2. AI watches every session, auto-tags rage clicks, confusion loops, and drop-offs
3. Get weekly UX reports with specific fix recommendations — push directly to Linear or Figma

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 1,000 sessions/month, basic heatmaps
- Pro ($29/mo): 25K sessions, AI analysis, UX reports, funnel insights
- Enterprise ($89/mo): Unlimited sessions, custom events, team analytics, SLA

**Ready-to-use Framer AI Prompt:**

**Project #9: CronMaster**

**Short Description:** Visual cron job builder with AI-powered monitoring — schedule any task, get plain-English alerts when things break, and let AI auto-fix common failures without waking you up at 3AM.

**Target Audience:** DevOps engineers, backend developers, solo developers running side projects, and startup CTOs who manage scheduled tasks across multiple servers and are tired of silent failures.

**Key Features:**
- Visual drag-and-drop cron job builder (no more cryptic cron syntax)
- Plain-English scheduling: "every weekday at 9am EST" instead of "0 9 * * 1-5"
- Multi-server monitoring with unified dashboard
- AI-powered failure detection and auto-remediation for common issues
- Smart alerts via Slack, PagerDuty, email, or SMS with context
- Execution history with detailed logs, duration tracking, and diff analysis
- Dependency chains: run Job B only after Job A succeeds
- One-click rollback to previous job versions

**Hero Headline:** "Cron Jobs That Actually Work. Every Time."

**Hero Subheadline:** "Visual scheduling, AI monitoring, and auto-fix — never get paged at 3AM for a failed cron job again."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Create jobs visually or in plain English — "backup database nightly at 2am, retry 3 times on failure"
2. AI monitors every execution, detects anomalies, and auto-fixes common failures (disk full, timeout, connectivity)
3. Get smart alerts only when human intervention is truly needed — with full context and suggested fixes

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 5 jobs, basic monitoring and alerts
- Pro ($25/mo): 50 jobs, AI auto-fix, multi-server, dependency chains
- Enterprise ($75/mo): Unlimited jobs, SLA, audit logs, custom integrations, SSO

**Ready-to-use Framer AI Prompt:**

> Create a premium, high-converting landing page in dark futuristic style for "CronMaster" — a visual cron job management and AI monitoring SaaS. Users build scheduled tasks visually or in plain English, and AI monitors executions, detects failures, auto-remediates common issues, and sends smart alerts only when human intervention is needed. **Project #10: BrandSnap AI**

**Short Description:** Generate a complete brand identity in 5 minutes — logo, color palette, typography, brand guidelines, social media templates, and business card designs — all from a text description of your business.

**Target Audience:** Early-stage startup founders, solopreneurs, freelancers, and small business owners who need professional branding but can't afford $5K+ for a design agency or wait 3 weeks for deliverables.

**Key Features:**
- Full brand kit from a single prompt: logo + colors + fonts + guidelines
- Multiple AI-generated logo concepts with infinite variations
- Color palette generator with accessibility-checked contrast ratios
- Typography pairing suggestions with Google Fonts integration
- Social media template pack (Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter, YouTube)
- Brand guidelines PDF auto-generated (ready to share with team/vendors)
- Business card, letterhead, and email signature designs
- Iterate and refine with AI chat: "make it more modern", "try warmer colors"

**Hero Headline:** "Your Entire Brand. In 5 Minutes."

**Hero Subheadline:** "AI generates your logo, colors, fonts, guidelines, and social templates — from just a description of your business."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Describe your business, vibe, and audience: "a premium fintech app for Gen Z — modern, bold, trustworthy"
2. AI generates multiple brand concepts: logos, color palettes, typography, and mockups
3. Pick your favorite, refine with chat, and download your complete brand kit (logo files, guidelines PDF, templates)

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 3 brand concepts, basic logo files (PNG)
- Pro ($19/mo): Unlimited concepts, SVG/AI files, social templates, brand guidelines PDF
- Business ($49/mo): Multiple brands, team collaboration, print-ready files, priority rendering

**Project #11: WaitlistWizard**

**Short Description:** Launch a viral waitlist page in 60 seconds — with built-in referral rewards, email capture, analytics, A/B testing, and social proof widgets. No code, no designers, no Mailchimp.

**Target Audience:** Indie hackers launching new products, startup founders in pre-launch, Product Hunt builders, and anyone who needs to validate demand and build an email list before building the product.

**Key Features:**
- One-click waitlist page generator with 20+ premium templates
- Built-in referral engine: users move up the list by sharing
- Email capture with custom fields and auto-tagging
- Real-time analytics: sign-ups, referral chain, conversion rate
- Social proof widgets: "237 people ahead of you", "1,429 signed up today"
- A/B testing for headlines, CTAs, and page designs
- Custom domain support and embed widget for existing sites
- Auto-email sequences: welcome, position update, launch announcement

**Hero Headline:** "Launch Your Waitlist. Go Viral. Ship When Ready."

**Hero Subheadline:** "Create a premium waitlist page with referral rewards, analytics, and email capture — in 60 seconds, zero code."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Describe your product — AI generates a stunning waitlist page with copy, design, and CTA
2. Activate referral rewards: users share your link to move up the waitlist
3. Watch sign-ups grow virally, analyze data in real-time, and launch when you're ready

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 1 waitlist, 500 sign-ups, basic analytics
- Pro ($15/mo): Unlimited sign-ups, referral engine, A/B testing, custom domain
- Growth ($45/mo): Multiple waitlists, API, webhooks, team access, white-label emails

**Project #12: FeedbackLoop AI**

**Short Description:** Aggregate, analyze, and prioritize all customer feedback from every channel — support tickets, reviews, NPS, social mentions, Slack — into one AI-powered product insight dashboard.

**Target Audience:** Product managers, customer success teams, and SaaS founders who drown in scattered feedback across Intercom, Zendesk, G2, Twitter, Slack, and surveys — and miss critical patterns.

**Key Features:**
- Unified feedback inbox: pulls from Intercom, Zendesk, G2, App Store, Twitter, Slack, surveys
- AI auto-categorizes feedback: feature request, bug, praise, churn risk, UX issue
- Sentiment analysis with trend tracking over time
- Auto-generated weekly product insight reports
- Feature request voting board auto-populated from real feedback
- Churn risk detection: alerts when negative sentiment clusters emerge
- Impact scoring: which feedback represents the most revenue/users
- Close-the-loop: notify customers when their request ships

**Hero Headline:** "Every Customer Voice. One Clear Signal."

**Hero Subheadline:** "AI aggregates feedback from every channel, finds patterns you're missing, and tells you exactly what to build next."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Connect your feedback sources (Intercom, Zendesk, G2, Slack, Twitter — 30+ integrations)
2. AI auto-categorizes, scores impact, detects sentiment trends, and identifies emerging themes
3. Get a prioritized product roadmap powered by real customer voices — updated in real-time

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 3 sources, 500 feedback items/month, basic categorization
- Pro ($35/mo): Unlimited sources, AI insights, weekly reports, voting board
- Enterprise ($99/mo): Churn detection, impact scoring, API, SSO, close-the-loop automation

**Project #13: MigrateBot**

**Short Description:** AI-powered data migration between any two SaaS tools — move from Airtable to Notion, HubSpot to Salesforce, or Trello to Linear — with automatic field mapping and zero data loss.

**Target Audience:** Operations managers, system administrators, startup teams switching tools, and agencies migrating client data — anyone who's ever spent weeks manually exporting, reformatting, and importing data between platforms.

**Key Features:**
- 150+ SaaS connectors (CRMs, PM tools, marketing, support, databases)
- AI auto-maps fields between source and destination (no manual mapping)
- Preview migration before executing: see exactly what will change
- Handles complex data: attachments, linked records, custom fields, formulas
- Incremental sync: migrate ongoing changes, not just a one-time dump
- Rollback capability: undo any migration within 30 days
- Migration audit log with detailed field-by-field report
- Handles 10M+ records without timeouts or failures

**Hero Headline:** "Switch Tools. Keep Everything."

**Hero Subheadline:** "AI migrates your data between any two SaaS platforms — automatic field mapping, zero data loss, done in minutes."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Connect your source and destination tools (150+ supported)
2. AI auto-maps fields, shows a preview of the migration, and flags anything that needs your attention
3. Execute migration with one click — rollback anytime within 30 days if needed

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 1 migration, up to 1,000 records
- Pro ($39/mo): Unlimited migrations, 100K records, incremental sync, priority support
- Enterprise ($119/mo): 10M+ records, custom connectors, SLA, dedicated migration engineer

**Ready-to-use Framer AI Prompt:**

**Project #14: PriceSpyAI**

**Short Description:** AI-powered competitive price monitoring for e-commerce — track competitor pricing across Amazon, Shopify stores, and marketplaces in real-time, with auto-repricing recommendations to maximize margins.

**Target Audience:** E-commerce brands, Amazon FBA sellers, D2C brands, and pricing analysts who need to monitor competitors' prices daily but waste hours doing it manually or paying $500+/mo for clunky enterprise tools.

**Key Features:**
- Track unlimited competitor products across Amazon, Shopify, eBay, Walmart, and any website
- Real-time price change alerts via Slack, email, or SMS
- AI-powered repricing recommendations to maximize margins
- Historical price trend charts with seasonal pattern detection
- MAP (Minimum Advertised Price) violation detection
- Competitor stock level monitoring (in-stock/out-of-stock alerts)
- Dynamic pricing rules: auto-adjust your prices based on competitor moves
- Weekly market intelligence reports with AI-generated strategy insights

**Hero Headline:** "Know Every Competitor's Price. Before They Do."

**Hero Subheadline:** "AI monitors competitor pricing in real-time, recommends optimal prices, and auto-adjusts your strategy to maximize margins."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Add your products and competitor URLs (or let AI auto-discover competitors)
2. AI monitors prices 24/7, tracks changes, and detects trends and seasonal patterns
3. Get instant alerts and AI repricing recommendations — or enable auto-adjust to stay competitive automatically

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 10 products, daily checks, basic alerts
- Pro ($29/mo): 500 products, hourly checks, AI repricing, trend charts
- Enterprise ($89/mo): Unlimited products, real-time checks, dynamic pricing rules, API, white-label reports

**Project #15: TestGenie**

**Short Description:** Describe your app's features in plain English and AI auto-generates end-to-end test suites — Playwright, Cypress, or Selenium — with self-healing selectors that don't break when your UI changes.

**Target Audience:** Frontend developers, QA engineers, startup CTOs, and engineering teams who know they should write tests but don't have time — and are tired of brittle selectors breaking every sprint.

**Key Features:**
- Describe test cases in plain English: "test that a user can sign up, verify email, and see dashboard"
- AI generates full test code in Playwright, Cypress, or Selenium
- Self-healing selectors: when UI changes, tests auto-update instead of breaking
- Visual test recorder: click through your app, AI generates the test code
- CI/CD integration: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins
- Parallel test execution with detailed failure reports
- Flaky test detection and auto-retry with root cause analysis
- Coverage analysis: see which user flows are untested

**Hero Headline:** "Tests That Write Themselves. And Fix Themselves."

**Hero Subheadline:** "Describe your test cases in English — AI generates production-ready e2e tests with self-healing selectors that never break."

**How it Works (3 steps):**
1. Describe your test scenarios in plain English or use the visual recorder to click-through
2. AI generates complete test suites in Playwright, Cypress, or Selenium
3. Run in CI/CD — when your UI changes, self-healing selectors auto-update instead of failing

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 10 test cases, basic code generation
- Pro ($35/mo): Unlimited tests, self-healing, visual recorder, CI/CD integration
- Enterprise ($99/mo): Parallel execution, flaky test detection, coverage analysis, SSO, SLA

**Ready-to-use Framer AI Prompt:**
